title: Stormy Weather
description: Immerse your Minecraft world in endless rain with this lightweight datapack that locks the weather and keeps the storm going forever.
body:
# **Stormy Weather**


is a simple but powerful Minecraft datapack that sets your world into a constant downpour. It locks the weather to rain and disables the weather cycle, ensuring the skies stay gray and wet indefinitely. Perfect for adding a gloomy, atmospheric vibe to any biome or build without changing other gameplay mechanics. Ideal for players who want persistent stormy weather without thunder or time changes.

 

 

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
